cmd: pwd; command -v mktemp; SCRATCH="$(mktemp -d)"; printf "SCRATCH=<%s>\n" "$SCRATCH"; export CODEX_HOME="$SCRATCH/Codex Home With Spaces"; printf "CODEX_HOME=<%s>\n" "$CODEX_HOME"; test -n "$SCRATCH"
